phrases.pronunciation: lay day-PAR ol uhn son oo
phrases.cultural_note: Gare de Lyon uses multiple halls; check hall and letter range.

responses.english: Hall 1 departures are on level 0, toward the Lyon street side.
responses.phonetic: lay day-PAR ol uhn son oh nee-VOH zero, koh-TAY roo duh lee-ON
responses.french: Les départs Hall 1 sont au niveau 0, côté rue de Lyon.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if this train is for Lyon Part-Dieu
phrases.text_local: Ce train va bien à Lyon Part-Dieu ?
phrases.pronunciation: suh trahn vah byan ah lee-ON par-DYUH
phrases.cultural_note: High-frequency routes still require platform confirmation before boarding.

responses.english: Yes, this is the train for Lyon Part-Dieu. Platform 12.
responses.phonetic: wee, say byan leh trahn poor lee-ON par-DYUH. vwah dooz
responses.french: Oui, c'est bien le train pour Lyon Part-Dieu. Voie 12.

phrases.cultural_note: Left-luggage hours are limited; verify cutoff times for pickup.

responses.english: Luggage service is open from 7 AM to 9 PM, on level 0.
responses.phonetic: leh sair-VEES bah-GAZH eh oo-VAIR duh set-oor ah van-tee-oo-NAHR, oh nee-VOH zero
responses.french: Le service bagages est ouvert de 7h à 21h, au niveau 0.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how early to arrive for TGV
phrases.text_local: Vous conseillez d'arriver combien de minutes avant le TGV ?
phrases.pronunciation: voo kon-say-YAY dah-ree-VAY kom-BYAN duh mee-NEWT ah-VON leh tay-zhay-VAY
phrases.cultural_note: For TGV, 20–30 minutes early is safer during busy periods.

responses.english: Arrive at least thirty minutes before departure.
responses.phonetic: ah-ree-VAY oh mwahn trahnt mee-NOOT ah-VAHN luh day-PAR
responses.french: Arrivez au moins trente minutes avant le départ.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Le Train Bleu restaurant is
phrases.text_local: Le Train Bleu est dans quelle partie de la gare ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh trahn bluh eh dahn kel par-TEE duh lah gar
phrases.cultural_note: Le Train Bleu is inside the station complex and popular for classic dining.

responses.english: Le Train Bleu is on the first floor, toward the Place de la Bastille side.
responses.phonetic: leh trahn bluh eh oh pruh-MYEHR ay-TAZH, koh-TAY plas duh lah bass-tee-Y
responses.french: Le Train Bleu est au premier étage, côté place de la Bastille.
